name: Aquatic Center
description: Aquatic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dyersville, IA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Asbury
description: Come play pickleball at Asbury in Asbury, IA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Cloie Creek
description: Cloie Creek is a place to play pickleball in Asbury, IA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Dubuque Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Dubuque Golf & Country Club in Dubuque, IA! There are 11 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 7 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights.

name: Dyersville Pickle Ball
description: Dyersville Pickle Ball is a place to play pickleball in Dyersville, IA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Five Flags Center
description: Five Flags Center is a place to play pickleball in Dubuque, IA. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Flora Park
description: Flora Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dubuque, IA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Veterans Memorial Park
description: Veterans Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dubuque, IA. There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: YMCA
description: YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Dubuque, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
